reviews.review_description:
I entered the app, and it says check your connection. Mine only reads two bars.

Tried contacting the developer.
No message was heard back.

Tried launching this on Windows 11, and it says, "Please Connect Controller To Use."

Launched Virtual Desktop and it says the same thing, and my Meta Quest 2 remotes were not working on this VR App.

Same thing happened in Google Play.
The Gyro Sensor was not launching.

So what's next? Should I watch VeeR Videos within Meta Quest's Browser by going to the VeeR TV Website or Watch VeeR on YouTube?

Hello I can't get veer on oculus gear and meta quest or my phones.  I really enjoyed it especially the solo dancing ladies and the vlog along with the AI girlfriends.  The inter dimensional and other countries women.  I  wish that it was interactive by having 3 to 4 ready made responses positive of course to their talking to us. And al the other great stuff. Is veer gone permanently  when I tried to get it it gave me other things to get it on. Please let me know if it is no more or if I just need to get it a different way. It's a awesome app and I miss it. Thank you

reviews.review_title: This and Within are the top VR contents.
reviews.review_description: I really wish they had alot more 360 pictures instead of just videos, but I think you can still kinda search for them.

reviews.review_title: One of the best for VR media
reviews.review_description: One of the best content-focussed apps for experiencing a wide range of VR media including 3D-180 and 3D-360 content..
Many good videos and experiences even without an account!
The search function has been unavailable and we hope to fix it.
